ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category associated with the size chart */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement range (e.g., 33-34in) */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement range (e.g., 31in) */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement range (e.g., 40in) */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length measurement (e.g., 41in) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for size chart creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for size chart update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart associated with the measurement */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., bust, waist, hips) */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value of the measurement range */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value of the measurement range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_measurements_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Customer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Customer's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "password" TEXT /* Customer's password (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer profile */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart associated with the customer */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Customer's bust measurement */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Customer's waist measurement */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Customer's hips measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for profile creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for profile update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_profiles_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_profiles_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., customer, admin, customer service) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_roles" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart recommended for the customer */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the recommendation (e.g., 0.8) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each size chart
ID of the category associated with the size chart
Size label (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL)
ID of the size chart associated with the measurement
Type of measurement (e.g., bust, waist, hips)
Minimum value of the measurement range
Maximum value of the measurement range
Unique identifier for each customer profile
ID of the size chart associated with the customer
Name of the role (e.g., customer, admin, customer service)
ID of the role associated with the customer
ID of the size chart recommended for the customer
